name: Carnivore Ribeye Strip Lunch Plate
instructions: Season steak generously with salt and pepper. Sear in very hot cast-iron 3 min per side for medium-rare. Rest 5 min, slice, serve with broth drizzled over.

name: Carnivore Ground Beef Burger Bowl
instructions: Mix beef with egg, salt, pepper. Form thick patty; cook in hot pan 4 min per side. Melt cheddar on top. Serve in bowl.

name: Carnivore Lamb Chop Lunch Plate
instructions: Season lamb chops generously. Sear in hot skillet 3-4 min per side until internal temp 135°F for medium. Rest 5 min and serve.

name: Carnivore Pork Tenderloin Slices
instructions: Season tenderloin. Sear all sides 3 min; finish at 400°F oven 15 min. Rest, slice, serve drizzled with warmed heavy cream.

name: Carnivore Turkey Breast Lunch Plate
instructions: Season turkey with salt and pepper. Cook in pan with broth, simmer covered 8 min per side until cooked through. Slice and serve with pan juices.

name: Carnivore Beef Liver and Bacon Plate
instructions: Cook bacon until crisp; crumble. In same pan cook sliced liver 2-3 min per side over medium-high. Season. Serve topped with crumbled bacon.

name: Carnivore Bacon Ground Beef Bowl
instructions: Cook bacon; crumble and set aside. Brown ground beef in same pan. Fry eggs alongside beef. Combine in bowl; season with salt.

name: Carnivore Sirloin Steak Strips
instructions: Slice sirloin thin against grain. Season generously. Sear strips in very hot dry pan 1-2 min total. Deglaze with broth and serve.

name: Carnivore Shrimp Butter Lunch Bowl
instructions: Cook shrimp in hot dry pan 1-2 min per side until pink. Add cream and simmer 2 min. Season with salt and pepper.

name: Carnivore Tuna Steak Plate
instructions: Drain tuna and place in bowl. Slice hard-boiled eggs alongside. Season with salt and pepper. Serve chilled.

name: Carnivore Ground Turkey Patties
instructions: Mix ground turkey with egg, salt, pepper. Form 2 patties. Cook in dry pan 5 min per side until cooked through.

name: Carnivore Halibut Lunch Plate
instructions: Season halibut. Pan-sear 4-5 min per side until golden. Drizzle with cream last minute. Serve immediately.

name: Keto Chicken Caesar Salad

ingredients.item: chicken breast, broilers or fryers, raw

instructions: Grill or pan-cook chicken breast; slice thin. Whisk olive oil, lemon, and Dijon for dressing. Toss romaine with dressing and parmesan. Top with sliced chicken.

name: Keto Avocado Tuna Lettuce Cups
instructions: Mash avocado; mix with tuna, lemon juice, mustard, and salt. Spoon into large romaine leaves and serve as cups.

name: Keto Beef Zucchini Noodle Bowl
instructions: Spiralize zucchini. Brown beef in olive oil with garlic and Italian seasoning. Add diced tomatoes; simmer 5 min. Pour over zucchini noodles.

name: Keto Salmon Spinach Salad
instructions: Season salmon; pan-sear 4 min per side. Flake over fresh spinach and sliced avocado. Dress with olive oil and lemon.

name: Keto Egg Salad Lettuce Cups
instructions: Chop hard-boiled eggs. Mix with Dijon mustard, olive oil, salt, and pepper. Spoon into romaine lettuce cups.

name: Keto Turkey Avocado Lettuce Cups
instructions: Lay romaine leaves flat. Spread with Dijon. Layer turkey slices and sliced avocado. Season with salt and pepper.

name: Keto Shrimp Cauliflower Rice Bowl
instructions: Pulse cauliflower to rice-size; sauté in 10ml oil 5 min. Cook shrimp in remaining oil with garlic 2 min per side. Serve shrimp over cauliflower rice with lemon.

name: Keto Pork Tenderloin Asparagus
instructions: Season pork with salt, pepper, garlic. Sear all sides in oil; roast at 400°F for 18 min. Toss asparagus with oil and roast last 12 min. Slice and plate together.

name: Keto Cheddar Beef Stuffed Peppers
instructions: Halve and hollow peppers. Brown beef with diced onion; season. Fill pepper halves. Top with shredded cheddar. Bake at 375°F for 20 min.

name: Keto Lamb Feta Salad
instructions: Season and cook lamb chop 3 min per side. Rest and slice thin. Toss greens, cucumber, feta with oil and lemon. Top with sliced lamb.

name: Keto Ground Beef Taco Lettuce Bowl
instructions: Brown beef with cumin and salt. Arrange chopped romaine in bowl. Top with beef, diced avocado, cheddar, and salsa.

name: Vegan Tempeh Stir Fry Bowl
instructions: Cube tempeh; stir-fry in sesame oil 5 min until golden. Add broccoli, garlic, ginger; cook 4 min. Add soy sauce; toss. Serve over brown rice.

name: Vegan Lentil Avocado Power Bowl
instructions: Warm lentils with cumin and olive oil. Place spinach in bowl; top with lentils, sliced avocado, and cherry tomatoes. Drizzle lemon juice.

name: Vegan Black Bean Quinoa Lunch Bowl
instructions: Mix warm quinoa with black beans, cumin, and olive oil. Top with diced avocado and halved cherry tomatoes. Drizzle lemon and serve.

name: Vegan Tofu Peanut Rice Bowl
instructions: Bake tofu cubes at 400°F for 20 min until crispy. Whisk peanut butter, soy sauce, ginger, sesame oil for sauce. Toss with rice and tofu; add cucumber strips.

name: Vegan Chickpea Spinach Wrap
instructions: Mash chickpeas with lemon, cumin, salt. Spread on tortilla. Layer with spinach and sliced avocado. Roll tightly and slice.

name: Vegan Edamame Quinoa Salad
instructions: Combine quinoa and edamame. Toss with sesame oil, soy sauce, grated ginger, and lemon. Add diced cucumber. Serve warm or chilled.

name: Vegan Butternut Squash Lentil Soup
instructions: Sauté onion and garlic in oil 3 min. Add cubed squash, lentils, 600ml water, cumin, salt. Simmer 20 min until squash is tender. Blend partially for creamy texture.

name: Vegan Kidney Bean Veggie Bowl
instructions: Massage kale with olive oil and lemon 2 min. Warm kidney beans with garlic. Bowl: rice base, topped with beans and massaged kale. Season and serve.

name: Vegan Kale Tahini Buddha Bowl
instructions: Roast chickpeas at 400°F 25 min until crispy. Massage kale with olive oil. Whisk tahini with lemon and garlic for dressing. Bowl: quinoa, kale, chickpeas; drizzle dressing.

name: Vegan Tempeh Avocado Wrap
instructions: Slice tempeh; pan-fry in sesame oil with soy sauce 3 min per side. Warm tortilla; layer spinach, tempeh, and sliced avocado. Roll and serve.

name: Vegan Black Bean Sweet Potato Burrito Bowl
instructions: Dice and roast sweet potato with oil, cumin, salt at 400°F 20 min. Warm beans. Bowl: rice base topped with black beans, roasted sweet potato, and salsa.

name: Vegan Lentil Mango Salad
instructions: Toss warm lentils with olive oil, lemon, and salt. Mix with fresh arugula and diced mango. Serve immediately.

name: Vegan Tofu Sesame Noodles
instructions: Bake tofu until crispy. Whisk sesame oil, soy sauce, peanut butter, grated ginger for sauce. Toss brown rice with sauce; top with tofu and sliced cucumber.

name: Vegan Chickpea Avocado Salad
instructions: Combine chickpeas, diced avocado, sliced cucumber, halved cherry tomatoes. Dress with olive oil, lemon, and salt. Toss gently and serve.

name: Pescatarian Salmon Caesar Wrap
instructions: Pan-sear salmon 4 min per side; flake. Whisk oil, lemon, Dijon, parmesan for dressing. Toss romaine with dressing; fill tortilla with romaine and salmon. Roll and slice.

name: Pescatarian Tuna Brown Rice Bowl
instructions: Season tuna with soy sauce, sesame oil, lemon. Arrange over brown rice. Top with sliced avocado and cucumber.

name: Pescatarian Shrimp Avocado Salad
instructions: Boil or grill shrimp 2-3 min until pink. Chill. Toss greens, cucumber, and avocado. Top with shrimp. Dress with olive oil and lemon.

name: Pescatarian Cod Taco Bowl
instructions: Season cod; bake at 400°F 12 min. Flake into bowl with rice. Top with shredded cabbage, avocado, salsa. Drizzle oil and lemon.

name: Pescatarian Halibut Quinoa Salad
instructions: Season halibut; pan-sear 4 min per side. Flake over warm quinoa and fresh arugula. Dress with olive oil and lemon.

name: Pescatarian Mahi Mahi Veggie Bowl
instructions: Roast broccoli with oil, garlic, salt at 400°F 15 min. Pan-sear mahi mahi 4 min per side. Serve fish and broccoli over quinoa with lemon.

name: Pescatarian Tilapia Taco Bowl
instructions: Season tilapia with cumin; cook in olive oil 3 min per side. Flake over rice. Top with black beans, avocado, and salsa.

name: Pescatarian Smoked Salmon Grain Bowl
instructions: Layer quinoa in bowl. Top with arugula, cucumber, and smoked salmon. Drizzle with olive oil and lemon.

name: Pescatarian Shrimp Edamame Bowl
instructions: Cook shrimp in sesame oil with grated ginger 2 min per side. Add edamame and soy sauce; toss. Serve over brown rice.

name: Pescatarian Tuna Mediterranean Salad
instructions: Toss greens, cherry tomatoes, and cucumber with olive oil and lemon. Top with tuna and crumbled feta.

name: Pescatarian Salmon Lentil Bowl
instructions: Pan-sear salmon 4 min per side. Flake over warm lentils and fresh spinach. Dress with olive oil and lemon.

name: Pescatarian Cod Kale Salad
instructions: Bake cod at 400°F 12 min. Massage kale with olive oil and lemon until tender. Serve flaked cod over kale with sliced avocado.

name: Pescatarian Tilapia Brown Rice Power Bowl
instructions: Pan-cook tilapia in sesame oil 3 min per side. Steam broccoli 4 min. Serve fish and broccoli over brown rice with soy sauce.

name: Pescatarian Shrimp Quinoa Mediterranean Bowl
instructions: Grill shrimp 2 min per side. Toss quinoa with cherry tomatoes, cucumber, feta, olive oil, and lemon. Top with shrimp.

name: Paleo Chicken Sweet Potato Bowl

ingredients.item: chicken breast, broilers or fryers, raw

instructions: Dice sweet potato; roast with oil, salt, paprika at 400°F 20 min. Pan-cook chicken 6 min per side. Slice and serve over spinach with sweet potato.

name: Paleo Beef Lettuce Wrap
instructions: Cook ground beef with onion, cumin, and olive oil until browned. Spoon into romaine leaves. Top with salsa and sliced avocado.

name: Paleo Salmon Avocado Mixed Green Salad
instructions: Pan-sear salmon skin-side down 4 min; flip and cook 2 min. Flake over greens with sliced avocado. Dress with olive oil and lemon.

name: Paleo Turkey Veggie Roasted Bowl
instructions: Roast cubed sweet potato and broccoli with oil and paprika at 400°F 20 min. Pan-cook turkey 6 min per side. Slice and serve with vegetables.

name: Paleo Lamb Roasted Vegetable Plate
instructions: Toss sliced zucchini and peppers with oil, rosemary, salt; roast at 400°F 15 min. Season lamb chop; sear 3-4 min per side. Serve with vegetables.

name: Paleo Beef and Beet Salad
instructions: Roast beets at 400°F 45 min; peel and slice. Sear steak 3 min per side; rest and slice. Toss arugula with oil and balsamic. Top with steak, beets, walnuts.

name: Paleo Chicken Butternut Squash Bowl

ingredients.item: chicken breast, broilers or fryers, raw

instructions: Cube squash; roast with oil, cinnamon, salt at 400°F 20 min. Pan-cook chicken 6 min per side. Slice and serve over spinach with roasted squash.

name: Paleo Ground Turkey Zucchini Bowl
instructions: Brown ground turkey with onion and garlic in olive oil. Season with Italian seasoning. Slice zucchini; fold into turkey and cook 3 more min.

name: Paleo Pork Apple Salad
instructions: Season pork; sear 3 min per side, finish at 400°F 10 min. Slice thin. Toss greens, sliced apple, walnuts with oil and balsamic. Top with pork.

name: Paleo Shrimp and Vegetable Salad
instructions: Cook shrimp in olive oil with salt 2 min per side. Chill briefly. Toss greens, julienned carrots, avocado with lemon and oil. Top with shrimp.

name: Mediterranean Chicken Quinoa Salad

ingredients.item: chicken breast, broilers or fryers, raw

instructions: Pan-grill chicken 6 min per side; slice thin. Toss quinoa with tomatoes, cucumber, feta, olive oil, and lemon. Top with sliced chicken.

name: Mediterranean Lentil Tomato Soup
instructions: Sauté onion and garlic in olive oil 4 min. Add lentils, diced tomatoes, cumin, salt, 400ml water. Simmer 15 min. Serve with olive oil drizzle.

name: Mediterranean Falafel Hummus Bowl
instructions: Roast chickpeas with paprika at 400°F 25 min until crispy. Spread hummus in bowl. Top with crispy chickpeas, cucumber, tomatoes. Drizzle with olive oil and lemon.

name: Mediterranean Shrimp Tuna Salad
instructions: Cook shrimp 2 min per side; chill. Toss greens and tomatoes with olive oil and lemon. Top with shrimp, tuna, and crumbled feta.

name: Mediterranean Salmon Arugula Salad
instructions: Pan-sear salmon 4 min per side. Toss arugula and tomatoes with olive oil and balsamic. Top with flaked salmon and crumbled feta.

name: Mediterranean Greek Veggie Bowl
instructions: Bowl: quinoa base topped with hummus. Add cucumber and cherry tomatoes. Drizzle with olive oil and lemon juice.

name: Mediterranean Chicken Eggplant Bowl

ingredients.item: chicken breast, broilers or fryers, raw

instructions: Cube eggplant; sauté in olive oil with garlic and Italian seasoning 5 min. Add tomatoes; simmer 10 min. Pan-cook chicken 6 min per side, slice; serve over eggplant.

name: Mediterranean Tuna Olive Salad
instructions: Toss greens, cucumber, and tomatoes with olive oil and lemon. Top with drained tuna; season with salt.
